overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a morning walk through a futuristic urban downtown. The scene features atmospheric haze, towering skyscrapers with vibrant digital billboards, and pedestrians navigating commercial plazas and outdoor staircases.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk observing street activity and colorful digital billboards

entered.detail: large vertical digital display with rainbow gradient colors on building facade
tall concrete wall with stairs leading to upper level
tall palm trees lining the street in the distance
futuristic curved street lamp along the sidewalk edge

segments.scene_description: Walking along a covered sidewalk next to a street, with a vibrant rainbow digital billboard visible on the left building and a concrete retaining wall with stairs on the right. The atmosphere is hazy with morning light filtering through.

scene_state.functional_zone: open pedestrian plaza with digital displays

events.description: exits covered sidewalk into open plaza area with expanded sky visibility

agents.ego_description: crossing the open plaza toward a large building complex with prominent digital displays

entered.detail: massive building facade covered with multiple digital screens and advertisements
large rectangular planters with vegetation scattered across the plaza
elevated walkway connecting buildings above the plaza level

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide pedestrian plaza with large concrete planters and a massive building featuring digital billboards ahead. The camera moves through scattered pedestrians toward the building complex.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway under elevated highway with green neon

events.description: enters covered area beneath elevated highway with green neon underlighting
camera tilts upward to view skyscraper tops against the hazy morning sky

agents.ego_description: walking under the overpass while observing the architecture and looking up at towering buildings

notable_agents.action: futuristic car parked along the curb under the overpass

entered.detail: massive concrete highway structure overhead with green neon strip lighting underneath
ambient green neon illumination from the overpass structure above
tall building with illuminated HOTEL signage on the facade
tall futuristic towers with reflective glass surfaces reaching into the haze

segments.scene_description: Moving beneath an elevated highway overpass illuminated by green neon lights, the camera tilts upward to reveal towering skyscrapers against the hazy sky. A hotel building becomes visible on the right as the camera progresses through the covered walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: hotel plaza with decorative pink trees

events.description: exits highway underpass into open hotel plaza with distinctive pink cherry blossom trees

agents.ego_description: navigating through the plaza passing pedestrians near the hotel entrance and pink trees

notable_agents.action: woman in white outfit walking ahead toward the hotel
man in casual clothes walking toward the camera

entered.detail: decorative trees with pink foliage planted in the plaza near the hotel
grand entrance to the hotel building with glass doors and signage
vertical digital screens displaying advertisements along the plaza edge

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the covered highway area into a sunlit plaza featuring distinctive pink cherry blossom trees and a prominent hotel entrance. Pedestrians move through the space as the camera approaches the hotel facade.

scene_state.functional_zone: wide outdoor staircase with teal railings

events.description: begins ascending multi-level staircase with teal colored railings to upper plaza

agents.ego_description: climbing the wide staircase alongside other pedestrians moving to the upper level

notable_agents.action: descending pedestrian in dark outfit walking down the stairs

entered.detail: wide concrete staircase with distinctive teal colored side walls
red handrails along the edges of the teal staircase walls
canopy structure visible at the top of the stairs with blue lighting

segments.scene_description: Ascending a wide outdoor staircase with distinctive teal walls and red railings, moving toward an upper plaza level. Other pedestrians are seen descending as the camera climbs toward the sunlight at the top.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a narrow, hazy street corridor into a sprawling urban plaza and beneath a towering highway overpass. It begins along a covered sidewalk where a vibrant rainbow digital billboard glows against the morning haze and a concrete retaining wall lines the path. As the camera moves forward, the space opens into a wide pedestrian plaza filled with large concrete planters and scattered people, drawing the viewer toward a massive building complex adorned with digital displays. The scene then shifts beneath the heavy shadow of an elevated highway overpass illuminated by green neon lights, where the camera tilts upward to reveal skyscrapers piercing the hazy sky. Finally, the movement continues through a covered walkway, passing a hotel building on the right as the urban scale reaches its peak.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a shaded urban underpass into a bright, multi-level commercial plaza. It begins by emerging from a covered highway area into the sunlight, passing by vibrant pink cherry blossom trees and pedestrians near a prominent hotel entrance. As the camera approaches the hotel facade, the perspective shifts upward to ascend a wide outdoor staircase. The scene then climbs past distinctive teal walls and red railings, moving against the flow of descending pedestrians. The movement finally culminates as the camera reaches the upper plaza level, moving fully into the open morning light.
